basic_details.job_title: East Coast Railway – Junior Engineer – 4 Posts
basic_details.short_information: East Coast Railway Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Junior Engineer (TRD). Candidates with Diploma, B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through East Coast Railway official website rrcbbs.org.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering including sub stream branches, ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass, 10+2 in Science Stream

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://rrcbbbs.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: East Coast Railway Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
